title: ⚡💼 CAREER SWITCH SALES ROLE 💼
description:
Entry Level | Training Provided | Performance-Based | Uncapped Earnings

🔄 STUCK IN A JOB WITH NO FUTURE?

If you feel:

Underpaid for the effort you put in

Stuck in a role with no clear progression

Unmotivated by fixed salary and routine work

This role is designed for people who want a reset and a better path forward.

👥 WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

We welcome:

Career switchers from any industry

Fresh graduates unsure where to start

ORD personnel entering the workforce

👉 No sales experience required.

👉 Full training is provided.

💼 WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will be trained to:

Communicate confidently with customers

Understand needs and recommend suitable solutions

Present products professionally

Handle objections and follow up

Work towards clear performance targets

This role develops communication, confidence, and people skills that are valuable in any career.

🎓 TRAINING & SUPPORT

We provide:

Step-by-step sales training

Product and communication coaching

Daily guidance from experienced leaders

Continuous feedback for improvement

👉 If you are coachable, you can succeed here.

💰 INCOME STRUCTURE

Performance-based commissions

Uncapped earning potential

High performers earn significantly more

Your income grows as your results improve

No waiting years for a raise.

Your effort determines your pay.

📈 CAREER PROGRESSION

Clear growth pathway:

Sales Executive

Senior Sales

Team Leader

Management roles

Promotions are based on results and leadership, not seniority.

✈️ TRAVEL & INCENTIVES

Incentive trips for top performers

Local and overseas exposure

Team rewards and recognition

Opportunities are earned through performance.

🎉 TEAM ENVIRONMENT

Supportive and energetic culture

Team nights and bonding activities

Recognition for effort and results

Leaders who mentor and guide

You grow faster in the right environment.

🚫 THIS ROLE MAY NOT SUIT YOU IF

You want guaranteed pay without pressure

You dislike performance-based roles

You avoid accountability

👉 CALL TO ACTION

🔥 If you’re ready for a career reset with growth and income:

👉 DM “SWITCH” or apply now

👉 Limited slots available

Comfort is temporary.

Growth lasts longer.

postedCompany.description:
We are a business firm that specialises in direct recruiting for global clients from SMEs to MNCs. 


We are looking for professionals in the Sales and Marketing industry.
